title: Social Media: Treatment for Respiratory Viruses | Respiratory Illnesses | CDC

Sept. 22, 2025 
Download 
Download 
Sample message 
English 
If you're at higher risk of getting very sick from a respiratory virus, it's important to seek medical care at the first sign of symptoms for treatment to work best. Don't wait--contact your healthcare provider as soon as possible. If you don't have one, your community health center or health department can help. Discover more at https://bit.ly/3Ubg0Rl 
Spanish 
Si tienes mayor riesgo de enfermarte gravemente por un virus respiratorio, es importante buscar atención médica apenas aparezcan los síntomas para que el tratamiento sea más eficaz. No esperes, contacta a tu proveedor de atención médica lo antes posible. Si no tienes uno, tu centro de salud comunitario o departamento de salud pueden ayudar. Descubre más en https://bit.ly/4pmO2Af

Respiratory Illnesses 
Respiratory illnesses affect the lungs and airways. Get information on common causes, prevention actions, and current levels of illness in your community.
